message.name: HEARTBEAT
message.description: Sealien data acquisition board heartbeat. Used by the ROS host to monitor STM32 online state and protocol version.
message.field: Device type or ROV type defined by the lower controller.
System status code defined by the lower controller.

message.name: IMU_DATA
message.description: Integrated IMU and DVL navigation data.
message.field: Up or ground-referenced velocity, matching the STM32 protocol table.
IMU heading turn count; positive and negative values are valid.
IMU calibration flag: 0 not calibrating, 1 calibrating.

message.name: THRUSTER_STATUS
message.description: Thruster status for up to 12 thrusters.
message.field: Thruster status code for each channel.
Thruster fault code for each channel.

message.name: GS_STATUS
message.description: Gimbal servo status.
message.field: Servo angle feedback: index 0 horizontal, index 1 pitch.
Servo step feedback: index 0 horizontal, index 1 pitch.
Reserved fields for future servo status expansion.

message.name: LED_STATUS
message.description: LED PWM status for ten lighting channels.

message.name: VCHECK
message.description: ADC check data for water ingress and temperature channels.
message.field: Water ingress detection state for four channels.
Temperature detection data for four channels.

message.name: HEIGHT_STATUS
message.description: Sonar altimeter target distance and strength data for five sonars.

message.name: DEPTH_STATUS
message.description: Depth sensor data for up to four channels.

message.name: BEM280
message.description: Board-mounted BME280 temperature, humidity and pressure sensor data.

message.name: SWITCH_STATUS
message.description: Relay switch status feedback for eight channels.

message.name: THRUSTER_CMD
message.description: Thruster speed command for up to 12 thrusters. Command unit is defined by the configured thruster driver.

message.name: THRUSTER_LOCK
message.description: Thruster lock command.

message.name: IMU_CALIB
message.description: IMU calibration origin data.

message.name: IMU_CLEAR
message.description: IMU turn counter clear command. The field value is ignored and only keeps the MAVLink payload non-empty.

message.name: LED_CMD
message.description: LED PWM command.

message.name: GS_CMD
message.description: Gimbal servo angle command.

message.name: GS_CFG
message.description: Gimbal servo configuration command.
message.field: Servo maximum angle: index 0 horizontal, index 1 pitch.
Servo minimum angle: index 0 horizontal, index 1 pitch.
Servo step: index 0 horizontal, index 1 pitch.

message.name: SWITCH_CMD
message.description: Relay switch command.
message.field: Relay command value from protocol table: 0 ON, 1 OFF.

message.name: DVL_DATA
message.description: DVL bottom-track and water-profile data. Invalid velocity values follow the DVL manual convention where -32.768 m/s means invalid.
message.field: Bottom-track range for four beams; 0 means bad bottom range detection.
Bottom-track velocity for four beams. Beam meaning depends on DVL coordinate frame; common mapping is v1 east/Y, v2 north/X, v3 up/Z.
Maximum bottom-track depth, expected range 1-6553.5 m.
Water-profile cell 1 velocity for four beams.
Water-profile cell 1 percent-good for each beam.
Water-profile cell 2 velocity for four beams.
Water-profile cell 2 percent-good for each beam.
Water-profile cell 3 velocity for four beams.
Water-profile cell 3 percent-good for each beam.
Water-profile cell 4 velocity for four beams.
Water-profile cell 4 percent-good for each beam.
Water-profile cell 5 velocity for four beams.
Water-profile cell 5 percent-good for each beam.
Water-profile cell 6 velocity for four beams.
Water-profile cell 6 percent-good for each beam.
Water-profile cell 7 velocity for four beams.
Water-profile cell 7 percent-good for each beam.
Water-profile cell 8 velocity for four beams.
Water-profile cell 8 percent-good for each beam.
Water-profile cell 9 velocity for four beams.
Water-profile cell 9 percent-good for each beam.
Water-profile cell 10 velocity for four beams.
Water-profile cell 10 percent-good for each beam.

message.name: MIXED_IO_CMD
message.description: Mixed IO board write command for GPIO output and DAC voltage channels.
message.field: GPIO outputs 1-32 bitmap. Bit 0 maps to GPIO 1; bit value 0 drives low and 1 drives high.
GPIO outputs 33-64 bitmap. Bit 0 maps to GPIO 33; bit value 0 drives low and 1 drives high.
DAC device 1 output voltage: indexes 0-3 map to Vout_A through Vout_D.
DAC device 2 output voltage: indexes 0-3 map to Vout_A through Vout_D.
DAC device 3 output voltage: indexes 0-3 map to Vout_A through Vout_D.

message.name: MIXED_IO_DATA
message.description: Mixed IO board readback data for GPIO output, GPIO input, DAC voltage and ADC voltage channels.
message.field: GPIO outputs 1-32 state bitmap. Bit 0 maps to GPIO 1; bit value 0 is low and 1 is high.
GPIO outputs 33-64 state bitmap. Bit 0 maps to GPIO 33; bit value 0 is low and 1 is high.
GPIO inputs 1-32 state bitmap. Bit 0 maps to GPIO 1; bit value 0 is low and 1 is high.
GPIO inputs 33-64 state bitmap. Bit 0 maps to GPIO 33; bit value 0 is low and 1 is high.
DAC device 1 current output voltage: indexes 0-3 map to Vout_A through Vout_D.
DAC device 2 current output voltage: indexes 0-3 map to Vout_A through Vout_D.
DAC device 3 current output voltage: indexes 0-3 map to Vout_A through Vout_D.
ADC device 1 input voltage: indexes 0-7 map to AI1 through AI8.
ADC device 2 input voltage: indexes 0-7 map to AI1 through AI8.
ADC device 3 input voltage: indexes 0-7 map to AI1 through AI8.

message.name: VALVE_CMD
message.description: Valve control board command from host to MCU. Covers 32-channel sensor power, 40-channel target current and 40-channel frequency. The MCU forwards valid values to the MVPE board over Modbus RTU.
message.field: 32-channel 24 V sensor power bitmap, bit 0 maps to channel 1. 0xFFFFFFFF means do not update sensor power.
Target current for 40 valves. Valid range is 0-1500 mA; -1 skips that valve in sparse frames.
Target frequency for 40 valves. Valid range is 110-2500 Hz; 0 skips that valve in sparse frames.

message.name: VALVE_STATUS
message.description: Valve control board feedback from MCU to host. Values are decoded from the MVPE Modbus register map documented in the protocol workbook.
message.field: Valve current readback in 10 mA units. Source: Modbus registers 2-21.
Valve state for 40 valves: 0 normal, 2 alarm, 3 offline. Source: Modbus registers 56-60.
Encoder 1 and encoder 2 counts. Source: Modbus registers 46-49.
Analog sensor 1-24 raw values. Source: Modbus registers 22-45.
Water ingress sensor voltage. Source: Modbus register 51.
Board supply voltage. Source: Modbus register 55.
Temperature channels 1, 2 and board temperature in 0.1 degC units. Source: Modbus registers 52-54.
